standing: Cast via /sorted as the harbor-master ticket — the device that keeps the fleet register + grants clearance, never sails, does not own the boats; the emit-chokepoint resolved into a rules/authority/truth trichotomy. Ratified by Akien ('looks good to me').

child a BUILT — the FLEET REGISTER (register.py): a compiled index over two vantages already on disk (open tickets in CairnCommons/tickets/ + in-port histories beside code). Buildable now because its sole dependency, the charter-state-history split, landed (child c PROVED 2026-07-24). Computed on read (no stored rival), so the db-vs-git placement edge dissolves. Live over the real fleet: 24 boats, 12 open / 12 in port.

child a PROVEN — the fleet register queries both berths of the real fleet (12 open / 13 in port, non-hollow), stays an index over the boats' own cursors (byte-equal to project(history), no drift, Law 7), and the reflexive tooth confirms the scan reaches both roots. Sealed under the tester (bare — netns unavailable on this host, not laundered).
